all_instances_config.description: Defines configuration for all instances, including optional labels and metadata. Labels and metadata must be provided as key-value pairs.

auto_healing_policies.description: Specifies auto-healing policies, including the required health check name and initial delay in seconds for health verification.

base_instance_name.description: Sets the base name for instances in the managed instance group. This value is required and must be unique within the group.

description.description: Provides a textual description of the managed instance group. This value is optional.

instance_lifecycle_policy.description: Defines lifecycle policies for instances, including optional actions on failure and whether to force updates during repairs.

list_managed_instances_results.description: Captures the results of listing managed instances. This value is optional and represented as a string.

name.description: Specifies the name of the managed instance group. This value is required and must be unique within the zone.

named_port.description: Defines named ports for the instance group, including the port number and its associated name. Port numbers must be valid integers.

standby_policy.description: Configures standby policies with optional initial delay and mode settings for instances in standby.

stateful_disk.description: Manages stateful disks, including the device name and optional delete rules for disk lifecycle management.

stateful_external_ip.description: Handles stateful external IP configurations, including optional delete rules and interface names.

stateful_internal_ip.description: Handles stateful internal IP configurations, including optional delete rules and interface names.

target_pools.description: Lists target pools for the instances in the group. Each pool must be specified as a string.

target_size.description: Defines the desired number of instances in the managed instance group. Must be a non-negative integer.

target_stopped_size.description: Specifies the desired number of stopped instances in the group. Must be a non-negative integer.

target_suspended_size.description: Specifies the desired number of suspended instances in the group. Must be a non-negative integer.

timeouts.description: Customizes timeout settings for create, delete, and update operations. Values should be provided in string format representing durations.

update_policy.description: Defines update policies, including surge and unavailability thresholds, minimal and disruptive actions, replacement methods, and policy type.
update_policy.type: list(object({max_surge_fixed: optional(number),max_surge_percent: optional(number),max_unavailable_fixed: optional(number),max_unavailable_percent: optional(number),minimal_action: string,most_disruptive_allowed_action: optional(string),replacement_method: optional(string),type: string}))

template_version.description: Specifies instance template versions for the group, including optional names and target size configurations with fixed or percentage values.
template_version.type: list(object({instance_template: string,name: optional(string),target_size: list(object({fixed: optional(number),percent: optional(number)}))}))

wait_for_instances.description: Indicates whether to wait for all instances to become stable before completing operations. Accepts true or false.

wait_for_instances_status.description: Specifies the status to wait for when ensuring instance stability. Must match a valid instance status string.

zone.description: Identifies the zone where the managed instance group is deployed. Must be a valid zone name within the cloud provider.
